rulings.Case Title: BRECKENRIDGE PROPERTY FUND 2016, LLC VS. CHRIS NORRIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 3, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT CHRISTOHPER HART's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Applicability of and compliance with SFRO cannot be properly addressed by demurrer. Complaint is sufficiently alleged and is not uncertain.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DYNASTY PROPERTIES, LLC, VS. JEFFREY KWONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendent'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Jeffrey Kwong
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 3, 2017 line 8. DEFENDANT JEFFREY KWONG's Motion To Continue Trial DENIED. No good cause for continuance.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SYTS INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. ALEX VALLADARES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 3, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT JIMY VASQUEZ and EDUARDO PACHECO's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Nothing on the face of the complaint indicates that the Unlawful Detainer concerns a residential dwelling unit subject to SFRO. Plaintiff's Request for judicial notice is denied. No Exhibit 1 is attached to complaint on file.= (501/REQ)
